scripts.build: esbuild cdp-utils.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=cdp-utils.js --external:bufferutil --external:utf-8-validate --banner:js='import{createRequire as __cr}from"module";var require=__cr(import.meta.url);' && esbuild _registry.ts list.ts send.ts read.ts history.ts model.ts screenshot.ts new-chat.ts project.ts --platform=node --format=esm --outdir=.
